message:
✨ Add slide-out animation and Escape key to AI Missions panel (#184)

- Panel now slides out to the right when closing instead of
  disappearing instantly
- Escape key closes the sidebar (exits fullscreen first if active)
- Both minimized and expanded views animate with translate-x transition

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
